description: Install the motion/trade-spot research schema, restart datavis only because motion routes changed, backfill the last two broker days, and export research CSVs without starting any trading worker.

actions.description: Create motionpoint, motionsignal, and motionstate tables for raw-mid research.
Restart datavis because this release adds a read-only motion signals API route.
Backfill motionpoint and motionsignal for the last two broker trading days.
Export last-two-day motion research tables into logs/motionpoint_last2days.csv and logs/motionsignal_last2days.csv.
Show detailed datavis systemd status after the motion research deploy completes.
